cases.title: Unauthorized Root Access Detected
cases.description: System logs show successful root login from unknown IP address 203.0.113.45 at 03:42 UTC. No corresponding change ticket exists.
cases.context: Company policy requires immediate escalation for any unauthorized privileged access. This IP is not in our approved range.

cases.title: Potential Data Exfiltration Event
cases.description: Firewall detected 15GB outbound transfer to unknown cloud storage endpoint over 2-hour period from employee workstation.
cases.context: Data loss prevention system flagged the transfer. Endpoint contained customer PII based on pattern matching.

cases.title: Ransomware Signature Detected
cases.description: EDR system identified file encryption behavior matching known ransomware family on file server FS-PROD-08.
cases.context: Automated containment has isolated the affected host. 127 files were encrypted before detection.

cases.title: Repeated Failed Login Attempts
cases.description: User account shows 25 failed login attempts from 3 different IP addresses within 10 minutes.
cases.context: Account belongs to finance team member. IPs are geographically dispersed (US, EU, APAC).

cases.title: Unpatched Critical Vulnerability Detected
cases.description: Vulnerability scan identified CVE-2024-1234 (CVSS 8.9) on 3 production web servers. Exploit code is publicly available.
cases.context: Patch was released 14 days ago. Affected servers handle customer portal authentication.

cases.title: Expired SSL Certificate on Dev Server
cases.description: Certificate for dev-internal.example.com expired yesterday. Server is only accessible from internal development network.
cases.context: This is a non-production development environment with no external exposure or sensitive data.

cases.title: Routine Compliance Scan Completed
cases.description: Monthly PCI-DSS compliance scan completed successfully with 0 high or medium findings.
cases.context: All systems passed. Report will be filed with compliance team per standard process.

cases.title: Antivirus Definition Update Failed
cases.description: Single workstation failed to download latest antivirus signatures due to temporary network issue.
cases.context: Workstation is in isolated guest network. User reported issue; update completed successfully after network restoration.

cases.title: Suspicious PowerShell Execution
cases.description: PowerShell executed with encoded command parameter on HR workstation. Command attempted network connection to external IP.
cases.context: Behavior matches reconnaissance patterns. User claims no knowledge of execution.

cases.title: Database Access from New Location
cases.description: Production database accessed by admin account from IP in country where company has no operations.
cases.context: Access occurred outside business hours. Query patterns appear normal but location is anomalous.

cases.title: DDoS Attack on Public API Gateway
cases.description: Network monitoring detected 2.4 million SYN packets per second targeting api.example.com from 4,800 distinct source IPs over 12 minutes.
cases.context: Traffic pattern matches CICIDS2017 DDoS-Hulk signature. Rate-limiting has degraded; legitimate traffic affected.

cases.title: SSH Brute Force Against Production Jump Host
cases.description: Bastion host recorded 8,750 failed SSH authentication attempts for account 'root' from IP 45.67.89.12 within 30 minutes.
cases.context: Source IP is on multiple threat intelligence blocklists. Pattern matches CICIDS2017 Patator SSH brute-force signature.

cases.title: FTP Brute Force Against Legacy File Server
cases.description: Legacy FTP server recorded 3,200 failed login attempts across 45 distinct usernames from IP 185.220.101.50.
cases.context: FTP is scheduled for decommissioning in 60 days. Server contains archived financial records.

cases.title: Port Scan of Internal Network Segment
cases.description: IDS alerted on TCP SYN scan covering ports 1-10000 across 254 internal IPs originating from workstation WS-ENG-042.
cases.context: Workstation assigned to engineer in firmware team. No corresponding penetration-test change ticket on file.

cases.title: Slowloris Attack on Customer Portal
cases.description: Web server pool reporting exhausted connection slots. 2,100 half-open HTTP connections held from 18 IPs for 20+ minutes.
cases.context: Pattern matches CICIDS2017 DoS Slowhttptest signature. Customer portal response times have degraded to >15 seconds.

cases.title: SQL Injection Attempt Against Login Endpoint
cases.description: WAF flagged 340 HTTP POST requests to /login containing UNION SELECT and OR 1=1 payloads from IP 103.45.12.77.
cases.context: CICIDS2017 web-attack signature match. WAF blocked all requests; no successful authentication recorded.

cases.title: Cross-Site Scripting Attempt in User Profile
cases.description: Input validation rejected 62 profile-update requests containing <script> and onerror= payloads from account user_8421.
cases.context: Stored XSS attempt pattern. Account created 48 hours ago. No successful payload reached the database.

cases.title: Heartbleed Vulnerability Scanning
cases.description: TLS handshake anomalies consistent with CVE-2014-0160 probing against 12 internet-facing endpoints.
cases.context: All endpoints are running OpenSSL 3.0+ (not vulnerable). Probing from a single autonomous system spanning 3 IPs.

cases.title: Botnet C2 Beaconing from Developer Laptop
cases.description: DNS resolver logged regular 60-second queries to domain associated with Ares botnet C2 infrastructure from laptop LT-DEV-177.
cases.context: CICIDS2017 Bot signature match. Laptop recently used on public WiFi during travel. EDR has not triggered.

cases.title: Infiltration via Dropped Backdoor Binary
cases.description: File integrity monitoring detected new SUID binary /usr/local/bin/srvhelper on production server PRD-WEB-03.
cases.context: Binary hash matches known Meterpreter payload. Installation coincided with successful SSH session from unusual geolocation.

cases.title: DoS Attack Using GoldenEye Tool
cases.description: Load balancer absorbing 180,000 requests/minute to a single application endpoint from 12 IPs over 8 minutes.
cases.context: CICIDS2017 DoS-GoldenEye signature. Auto-scaling has tripled compute cost for the affected service.

cases.title: Failed Web Brute Force Against Admin Console
cases.description: Admin portal recorded 950 failed authentication attempts against username 'admin' from IP 198.51.100.23 over 5 hours.
cases.context: Pattern matches CICIDS2017 web brute-force. Rate limit kicked in; no successful logins observed.

cases.title: Traffic Spike from Low-Reputation ASN
cases.description: Inbound traffic from AS204287 increased 40x above baseline, primarily to low-traffic application endpoints.
cases.context: ASN associated with residential proxy services. No application errors reported; traffic pattern is reconnaissance-adjacent.

cases.title: Scheduled Authorized Penetration Test Activity
cases.description: IDS alerted on nmap service enumeration across the DMZ subnet from IP 10.44.200.15.
cases.context: IP is registered to the external penetration testing vendor. Engagement ticket RTS-2026-041 covers this window.

cases.title: Low-Volume Scanner Traffic from Research Network
cases.description: 5 TCP connection attempts to common ports originated from a university research scanner (shadowserver-identified).
cases.context: Scanner is registered with Shadowserver; traffic is part of legitimate internet measurement research. No service impact.

cases.title: TCP Session Anomaly on Monitoring VLAN
cases.description: Malformed TCP options observed in 18 packets on the monitoring VLAN from legacy network appliance.
cases.context: Appliance firmware has a known bug producing these malformed options. No security impact; ticket already filed for replacement.

cases.title: Long-Lived TLS Session to Unknown Endpoint
cases.description: Workstation WS-MKT-009 maintained an encrypted session to IP 91.234.56.78 for 14 hours with 2.3GB transferred.
cases.context: IP geo-locates to an Eastern European VPS provider. User is on vacation and workstation should be idle.

cases.title: Web Shell Upload Attempt Blocked
cases.description: File-upload endpoint rejected 7 attempts to upload PHP files containing system() and shell_exec() calls.
cases.context: Uploads came from single session after valid authentication as contractor account. Account created 10 days ago.

cases.title: Internal Host Scanning Adjacent Subnets
cases.description: Server DB-ANALYTICS-04 initiated TCP connects to 512 hosts across two non-adjacent subnets in 6 minutes.
cases.context: Server is a data warehouse with no legitimate reason to scan subnets. Possible lateral movement.

cases.title: ICMP Flood From Branch Office
cases.description: Core router logged 120,000 ICMP echo requests from branch VPN tunnel to internal server farm over 4 minutes.
cases.context: Branch office reports a diagnostic script misfired. ICMP rate limit absorbed the traffic; no service impact.

cases.title: Valid Account Abuse After Credential Theft [T1078]
cases.description: User account 'j.patel' authenticated successfully from Tor exit node, then accessed 47 HR documents never previously opened.
cases.context: MITRE T1078 (Valid Accounts). Employee is currently on approved leave with no expected system access.

cases.title: Data Encryption Spree on File Shares [T1486]
cases.description: File share monitoring detected 4,300 files renamed with .locked extension across 3 departments in 90 seconds.
cases.context: MITRE T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact). Pattern matches LockBit 3.0. Source is compromised service account svc-backup.

cases.title: Public-Facing App Exploitation Attempt [T1190]
cases.description: WAF blocked 180 requests exploiting CVE-2024-27198 (JetBrains TeamCity auth bypass) against build.example.com.
cases.context: MITRE T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application). Server was patched last week; WAF confirmed no successful exploitation.

cases.title: Spearphishing Link Clicked by Finance [T1566.002]
cases.description: Email gateway recorded that CFO clicked a link to invoice-update[.]com, a domain registered 2 days ago.
cases.context: MITRE T1566.002 (Spearphishing Link). Browser isolation captured the session; no credentials submitted.

cases.title: Credential Dumping Tool on Domain Controller [T1003]
cases.description: EDR detected mimikatz.exe execution on DC-CORP-01 at 02:17 AM UTC by SYSTEM account.
cases.context: MITRE T1003 (OS Credential Dumping). No scheduled maintenance window. EDR isolated the host and blocked process.

cases.title: Scheduled Task Persistence Mechanism [T1053.005]
cases.description: Windows Scheduler created task 'MicrosoftUpdateAssistant' pointing to C:\ProgramData\svchost32.exe on 6 endpoints.
cases.context: MITRE T1053.005 (Scheduled Task/Job). Binary is unsigned; hash matches no known-good baseline.

cases.title: Suspicious WMI Subscription Creation [T1546.003]
cases.description: WMI event subscription created on workstation WS-ACCT-018 that triggers on logon and runs a base64-encoded PowerShell command.
cases.context: MITRE T1546.003 (WMI Event Subscription). Decoded command performs DNS tunneling to an untrusted domain.

cases.title: Registry Run Key Modification [T1547.001]
cases.description: Sysmon event 13 fired for HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run modification on WS-FIN-022.
cases.context: MITRE T1547.001 (Registry Run Keys). New value 'Updater' points to AppData\Roaming\svc.exe; unsigned binary.

cases.title: Discovery via net.exe Enumeration [T1087]
cases.description: Process telemetry shows net group /domain, net user /domain, and nltest /domain_trusts executed within 20 seconds on WS-HR-004.
cases.context: MITRE T1087 (Account Discovery). Normal users do not issue domain enumeration commands in this pattern.

cases.title: Lateral Movement via SMB Admin Shares [T1021.002]
cases.description: Network sensor observed 42 authenticated SMB connects from WS-MKT-011 to ADMIN$ shares across 30 servers in 3 minutes.
cases.context: MITRE T1021.002 (SMB/Windows Admin Shares). Source workstation has no admin function; user is in marketing.

cases.title: Command-and-Control over HTTPS [T1071.001]
cases.description: Network flow anomaly: workstation WS-ENG-003 maintains 4-second periodic beacon to updates-telemetry[.]org for 6 hours.
cases.context: MITRE T1071.001 (Web Protocols). Domain registered 3 weeks ago; TLS certificate self-signed.

cases.title: Data Staged in Unusual Archive [T1560.001]
cases.description: File monitoring detected creation of 2.8GB RAR archive 'q4-export.rar' in %TEMP% on finance controller workstation.
cases.context: MITRE T1560.001 (Archive via Utility). Archive contains CSV exports of customer PII tables.

cases.title: Exfiltration Over DNS Tunneling [T1048.003]
cases.description: DNS server logged 18,000 TXT record queries to subdomain *.ex.malicious-domain.io from a single host in 15 minutes.
cases.context: MITRE T1048.003 (Exfiltration Over Unencrypted Non-C2). Query volume is 300x baseline for this host.

cases.title: Defense Evasion via Log Clearing [T1070.001]
cases.description: Windows Security Event Log ID 1102 (audit log cleared) fired on DC-CORP-02 at 03:45 AM UTC.
cases.context: MITRE T1070.001 (Clear Windows Event Logs). No authorized maintenance window. Prior events not recoverable.

cases.title: Unusual Service Account Interactive Logon [T1078.002]
cases.description: Service account 'svc-sql-backup' performed interactive logon (type 2) on 4 servers within 30 minutes.
cases.context: MITRE T1078.002 (Domain Accounts). Service accounts are policy-restricted to non-interactive (type 5) logons only.

cases.title: PsExec Execution on Workstation [T1569.002]
cases.description: PsExec.exe launched svchost-update.exe on WS-HR-007 from remote host WS-IT-002.
cases.context: MITRE T1569.002 (System Services). WS-IT-002 has no IT-admin role; both hosts are non-privileged user workstations.

cases.title: Authorized Red-Team Exercise Activity
cases.description: EDR observed Cobalt Strike beacon behavior from three workstations in the executive suite.
cases.context: Red-team engagement ticket RTE-2026-009 authorizes this activity; rules-of-engagement on file; scope includes these assets.

cases.title: Legitimate Admin Activity Matching Discovery Pattern
cases.description: IT staff account ran net user /domain and Get-ADUser commands as part of quarterly access review.
cases.context: Access review ticket ACR-Q1-2026 documents this activity; performed by authorized IT admin; within business hours.

cases.title: Backup Service Encrypting Files by Design
cases.description: File monitoring detected 12,000 files receiving .enc extension and AES-encrypted contents on file share FS-BKP-01.
cases.context: Veeam backup job scheduled for 02:00 UTC runs nightly with encryption-at-rest enabled. Job ID matches the ticketed configuration.

cases.title: Vendor Vulnerability Scan of External Assets
cases.description: External ASM tool logged reconnaissance activity (banner grabs, TLS enumeration) across public-facing assets.
cases.context: Activity is from contracted attack-surface management vendor on scheduled weekly scan; scope and window documented.
